trades.thesis: Both JaguarAnalytics and Banana3Stocks suggested that GLD is about to break out.
trades.sellPlan: If GLD goes above $500, I would consider selling.
trades.alert: Alert if GLD rises above $500 or falls 10% from its tracked high.

trades.thesis: JaguarAnalytics suggested trade. Bull case into early-August Q2/CY26 earnings: Shopify is outpacing e-commerce and competitors. U.S. Q2 e-commerce sales $408B (+12.6% Y/Y); Shopify at record scale with 2.9M active stores (+11%), 75K Plus merchants (+21%), 155M Shop App MAUs (+40%), and 8.4M unique admin visitors (+36%). Competitors shrank about 11% Y/Y while Shopify won enterprise migrations including Forever 21, Indigo, and SaltWorks, supporting a widening moat. SHOP closed $124.48 July 20. Options positioning was optimistic, with JaguarFlow flagging a large call roll into October $135 strikes ahead of earnings.
trades.horizon: Months; re-evaluate when SHOP is above $148
trades.stopPlan: 20% trailing stop based on the call option/strategy market value, not SHOP share price
trades.alert: Alert when SHOP reaches $148; when the option strategy falls 20% from its highest tracked market value; and one day before SHOP earnings for a pre-earnings review
trades.risks: Monitor whether the bull thesis reverses: e-commerce growth weakens; active stores, Shopify Plus merchants, Shop App MAUs, or admin visitors decelerate; competitors regain share; enterprise migrations slow or reverse; GMV/revenue or margins disappoint; management guidance weakens; or bullish options positioning unwinds.
